modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to open zipped files including .tar and .gz formats.

full_description_text: User downloaded zipped folders with multiple files. They are unable to open a zip file. Additionally, they have .tar and .gz files and are asking if there is a way to open those files. The issue persists despite using 7-Zip on Windows.
short_description: Unable to open zipped files including .tar and .gz formats.
description: User downloaded zipped folders with multiple files. They are unable to open a zip file. Additionally, they have .tar and .gz files and are asking if there is a way to open those files. The issue persists despite using 7-Zip on Windows.
